name: 7001 A.D.
description:
"5000 years pass and the world is plunged into a technological marvel that is far beyond the imagination of today. It is one persons quest to live the life of someone in this distant future."

(This is perhaps my most detailed bot yet! I have tried my best to go all out with this one to try and provide a great experience of what it might be like to live this far in the future!)
creator: Yahkoi
